message:
fix(api): replace placeholder session auth with transcript-bound HMAC-SHA256 verification

Replace record-only key IDs and pass-through signatures in session_auth.rs
with real cryptographic verification using epoch-scoped HMAC-SHA256:

- Handshake MAC: establish_session() now requires a transcript-bound HMAC
  proving possession of the root secret (INV-SCC-HANDSHAKE-BIND)
- Message MAC: process_message() verifies transcript-bound MACs via ct_eq_bytes
  instead of recording opaque signature strings (INV-SCC-MSG-VERIFY)
- Chain binding: per-message MACs include the handshake MAC, preventing
  cross-session credential reuse
- Public signing APIs: sign_handshake() and sign_session_message() for callers
- Length-prefixed preimage encoding for all variable-length fields
- Domain-separated HMAC with SESSION_AUTH_DOMAIN and distinct prefixes for
  handshake vs message transcripts
- 13 adversarial tests: forged handshake, wrong secret, session ID swap,
  identity swap, forged message, payload swap, cross-session replay,
  direction swap, wrong secret message, and regression test confirming
  opaque signatures are no longer accepted
- All 55 tests pass (42 updated + 13 new)

Closes: bd-ac8j

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
